items.title: Bo Nix: Nearing practice return?
items.body_text: Broncos coach Sean Payton said Thursday that Nix (ankle) has been throwing at OTAs and will resume practicing with teammates at June minicamp, Luca Evans of The Denver Post reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Sam LaPorta: Practices Thursday
items.body_text: LaPorta (back) participated in Detroit's second open practice of OTAs on Thursday, Tim Twentyman of detroitlions.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: George Kittle: Says he's ahead of schedule
items.body_text: Kittle (Achilles) said Wednesday that he's "doing great" and is "ahead of schedule" in his rehab, ESPN.com's Nick Wagoner reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Mike Evans: Winning over teammates and coaches
items.body_text: Evans is making a strong impression at voluntary OTAs and feels rejuvenated after an injury-plagued 2025, Matt Barrows of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: George Pickens: Expected back for minicamp
items.body_text: Pickens hasn't been present for voluntary OTAs, but he remains in communication with the Cowboys and is expected to show up for mandatory minicamp June 16-18, Nick Harris of the Fort Worth Star-Telegram reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
